zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡偏多延续]
zh.content:
当前价格围绕1714震荡，处于1710-1719窄幅区间。短线维持均线之上运行，整体结构偏多但动能有限，呈整理上攻形态。

MACD维持正值18.85，显示多头动能仍在，但指标未出现放量加速。缺少RSI参考下，动量判断以震荡偏强为主。SMA20位于1697附近提供动态支撑。

上方阻力关注1719及1725区域，若有效突破将打开短线延伸空间。下方初步支撑在1710，其次为1697均线密集区，回踩仍属多头结构内整理。

短线策略建议维持区间思路，高抛低吸为主。未放量突破前避免追涨，可在1710附近分批布局多单，止损设于1697下方，目标看向1725上方。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase around 1714, showing limited volatility after a mild intraday recovery. The broader structure suggests a neutral-to-slightly bullish bias as price holds above the 20-day simple moving average near 1697. This positioning indicates buyers are still defending key dynamic support, while momentum lacks strong directional conviction, resulting in a range-bound environment with gradual upward pressure building.

MACD reading is positive at 18.85788, indicating underlying upward momentum, although the absence of a confirmed signal line limits full interpretation. RSI is not available, so overbought/oversold conditions cannot be assessed precisely. Overall, momentum remains mildly positive but not yet strong enough to confirm a sustained trend, with low volatility reinforcing consolidation behavior. Market structure suggests indecision among participants overall.

Immediate support sits near 1710, where price has repeatedly stabilized during intraday dips, while stronger structural support aligns with the 20-day SMA at 1697. A breakdown below this zone could expose lower liquidity pockets toward 1680. On the upside, resistance is forming at 1718–1720, followed by a more significant barrier around 1735 and 1750, where prior supply has historically limited advances.

Given the current structure, short-term strategies favor range trading rather than trend following. Buying near support zones around 1710 or closer to 1697 offers favorable risk-reward positioning, provided tight risk controls are maintained. A sustained breakout above 1720 would signal renewed bullish momentum and open room for continuation toward higher resistance levels, while failure to hold 1697 would invalidate the near-term bullish bias and shift sentiment bearish.
